LAW AND MOTION 301, PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED ON THE FOLLOWING CONDITION: PLAINTIFF MUST EITHER WITHIN 30 DAYS TENDER THE AMOUNT OF $878,956.10 THE CURRENT PAY-OFF OR $715,474.00 AND POST A BOND ON THE DIFFERENCE. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN SUFFICIENT LIKELIHOOD OF PROVING THAT DEFENDANT AGREED TO REINSTATE THE LOAN BASED ON A LUMP SUM AND MONTHLY PAYMENTS SPECIFIED BY DEFENDANT IN OCTOBER 2008 AND PLAINTIFF WOULD BE IRREPERABLY HARMED IF THE PROPERTY WERE SOLD PRIOR TO RESOLUTION OF THIS DISPUTE. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR #8189

Off Calendar Aug-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KEITH M. VELLECA, TEL. NO. 974-1200 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. TERRY M. WEYNA OF THE LITCHFIELD & CAVO LLP, TEL. NO. (626) 683-5074 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction - PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED ON THE FOLLOWING CONDITION: PLAINTIFF MUST EITHER WITHIN 30 DAYS TENDER THE AMOUNT OF $878,956.10 THE CURRENT PAY-OFF OR $715,474.00 AND POST A BOND ON THE DIFFERENCE. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN SUFFICIENT LIKELIHOOD OF PROVING THAT DEFENDANT AGREED TO REINSTATE THE LOAN BASED ON A LUMP SUM AND MONTHLY PAYMENTS SPECIFIED BY DEFENDANT IN OCTOBER 2008 AND PLAINTIFF WOULD BE IRREPERABLY HARMED IF THE PROPERTY WERE SOLD PRIOR TO RESOLUTION OF THIS DISPUTE. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
